query: Loppet Festival Marathon cross country ski race Theodore Wirth Park

videos.title: Loppet Foundation opens portion of cross-country skiing trails at Theodore Wirth
videos.description:
When it snows in October, many people in Minnesota are craving skiing. 

Marth Bardwell and her daughter Naomi couldn't resist. 

Just this week at Theodore Wirth Park, The Loppet Foundation opened a portion of the cross-country skiing trails. It's the earliest they've ever welcomed skiers and it's likely the first place in the state to make snow this year.

https://www.kare11.com/article/sports/loppet-foundation-opens-portion-of-cross-country-skiing-trails-at-theodore-wirth-park/89-bd2f1df2-a7fb-4122-bdfc-025e145cc830

videos.title: World Cup cross-country ski race canceled
videos.description:
A four-day skiing festival that would have brought athletes from around the world to Minneapolis has been canceled, with the organizers citing the health of the community as a reason. 

In a press release, John Munger, executive director of the Loppet Foundation said, "In keeping with updated information from the Minnesota Department of Health and after consulting with medical advisors, we are prioritizing the health and safety of our community, fans, athletes, staff and volunteers involved in these events."

https://www.kare11.com/article/news/health/coronavirus/fastenal-parallel-45-festival-and-world-cup-canceled-over-coronavirus-concerns/89-e3d833fb-15cb-4df8-b681-f82506364a09

videos.title: Loppet Winter Festival Expected To Draw Large Crowds From Mild Temperatures
videos.description:
Preparations are underway at Theodore Wirth Park for cross country ski racing and Lake of the Isles will host the annual luminary celebration, Susan-Elizabeth Littlefield reports (2:22).
WCCO 4 News at 6 – January 31, 2020

videos.title: City of Lakes Loppet Winter Festival Makes Changes Amid Pandemic
videos.description: The City of Lakes Loppet Winter Festival is normally a three-day event, but this year it's being split into two weekends (1:38). WCCO 4 News At 6 - January 30, 2021

videos.title: 2013 Gatineau Loppet 55k Classic Race Review
videos.description:
ActiveSteve, not even recovered from tackling the Canadian Ski Marathon the week before, heads back out with his skis on to cover another classic Canadian ski event, the Gatineau Loppet, heading into it's 35th year. To commemorate the 35th year, the Classic event featured a 55km and 38km linear (point-to-point) route instead of the normal looped course. Under brilliant skies and great snow conditions, he lined up with participants from around the world. Check out the video to see how is all unrolled.

Music: Dan-O Songs

videos.title: 2020 Loppet Events Recap / 2021 Events Update
videos.description: 2020 was a big year for Loppet events, so big in fact that it almost included the first Cross Country Ski World Cup on US Snow in almost 20 years! However, COVID-19 changed the way we plan and execute events at the Loppet Foundation. We shifted towards semi-virtual events and socially-distanced events throughout the spring, summer, and fall. Now we are looking towards a winter of skiing AND racing too. Check out our latest plans for this year's City of Lakes Loppet Winter Festival... and even a future World Cup!

videos.title: Canadian Worldloppet: Gatienau Loppet
videos.description: In 2021 the Canadian Worldloppet event, the Gatineau Loppet, has to take place virtually. Register on the website, do your race at home and upload your gps-file to the result list.
